dependency_map.rationale: Establish core policy/runtime controls and branch/release metadata foundations.
Close release-governance drift so extraction PRs are governed consistently.
Extract evidence signature/timestamp/archive controls after core runtime gates exist.
Extract provider/intake runtime after core and evidence gates are validated.
Extract Euria API/runtime flow after core gateway/evidence controls are stable.
Defer lower value or mixed-scope branches until high-value runtime waves close.
Do not extract until blocker-specific validation is resolved.
